task.title: Add agent-assistant VFS primitive for Sage

events.content: Added VFS as a provider-neutral agent-assistant primitive: Added VFS as a provider-neutral agent-assistant primitive

raw.question: Added VFS as a provider-neutral agent-assistant primitive
raw.chosen: Added VFS as a provider-neutral agent-assistant primitive
raw.reasoning: The CLI/parser/output logic is reusable across products; Sage should only adapt RelayFile data into the shared VfsProvider contract.

retrospective.summary: Added @agent-assistant/vfs as a provider-neutral VFS contract and CLI runner with tests.
